name: Story DoR — Risk & Compliance Extensions (Starter Draft)
description: Placeholder criteria for Risk & Compliance stories. Risk stewards should review and customize.
placeholder_note: Starter content. Replace with real Risk & Compliance DoR criteria.

criteria.name: Regulatory Citation Provided
criteria.description: The specific regulation, rule, or internal policy driving this story is cited (with section/version).
criteria.why: Compliance work without a regulatory anchor cannot be defended in audit and tends to drift.
criteria.fix: Cite the regulation (FHFA Advisory Bulletin, SEC Rule, FFIEC guidance, or internal policy) with section and version.
criteria.good_example: Driven by FHFA Advisory Bulletin AB 2024-04, Section 3.2. Internal policy ref: RISK-POL-117 v3.

criteria.name: Audit Log Requirement Stated
criteria.description: Whether the change requires an immutable audit log (and what it should capture) is documented.
criteria.why: Risk and compliance workflows need replayable audit logs — features without explicit logging requirements ship without them.
criteria.fix: State whether audit logging is required and which fields, actor identifiers, and retention apply.
criteria.good_example: Audit log: every override decision logged with actor, timestamp, before/after values, and justification text. Retention: 7 years per RISK-POL-117.

criteria.name: Sign-Off Chain Defined
criteria.description: The required approval / sign-off chain for the change is stated (e.g. 1st line, 2nd line, internal audit).
criteria.why: Risk changes that ship without the right approvals create internal-audit findings.
criteria.fix: List the required approvers in order. Reference the policy that mandates the chain.
criteria.good_example: Sign-off chain: 1st-line owner ([name]) → 2nd-line risk reviewer ([name]) → Internal Audit (informational). Policy: RISK-GOV-21.

criteria.name: Effective Date Stated
criteria.description: The date the change becomes effective (regulatory deadline or internal go-live) is stated.
criteria.why: Compliance work has hard external deadlines; effective dates buried in conversations don't make sprint commitments visible.
criteria.fix: State the effective date and whether it's an external regulatory deadline or an internal target.
criteria.good_example: Effective date: 2026-07-01 (FHFA Advisory Bulletin compliance deadline). Hard deadline; cannot slip.
